title: SfxPlan
description: Action sound-effects plan. Describes where and how punchy impact / weapon / combat SFX should land in the final mix, beat-aligned with the song. Produced by `ff sfx plan` from the shot-list + beat-map and consumed by the mixer.

scene_audio_blend.description: Controls whether original source-clip audio is blended under the song.

gain_db.description: Gain applied to source-clip audio. Typical -18 to -24 dB so it sits under the song.

duck_to_song_db.description: Duck the scene audio by this much when the song peaks (drops).

duck_db_during_dialogue.description: Duck the scene audio by this much (additive on top of gain_db) while a dialogue cue is playing. Default -60 dB = effectively silent. Lets injected narrative dialogue sit clean on top of source ambient bleed.

events.description: Ordered list of SFX placements, each pointing at a variant pack.

variant.description: Which SFX file in the pack to use. Rotation is pre-picked so the same shot doesn't reuse the identical sound.
